response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals across 15+ years and multiple domains, this role requires specialized expertise in embedded network security that is largely absent from his background. Most critically, native-level Japanese language proficiency is explicitly required and not present on the resume. His recent experience (Google, Meta) focuses on web applications and infrastructure rather than embedded firmware security. There is no demonstrated knowledge of the required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption systems) or embedded networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP). The last relevant embedded systems work dates to 2014-2015.
strengths: 15+ years of proven software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with strong engineering practices and TDD commitment
Experience with C programming and Linux from National Instruments role; demonstrated low-level systems thinking
Technical leadership and mentoring through workshops, courses, and open-source contributions showing depth of knowledge
concerns: Missing native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit required qualification for the role
No demonstrable experience with security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, authentication systems, encryption) or embedded network security domains
Recent work focuses on web applications and infrastructure tooling; last embedded systems experience was in 2014-2015, decade-old gap in the required domain
